channel.title: lignin biosynthesis on funPlantGenes
channel.description: Recent content in lignin biosynthesis on funPlantGenes

item.title: BM5;Zm4CL2
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb233720 Gene Symbol: BM5 Zm4CL2 Zm4CL Zm4CL1 cml1 Gene Name: brown midrib5 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: RUM1
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb156910 Gene Symbol: RUM1 Gene Name: ROOTLESS WITH UNDETECTABLE MERISTEMS 1 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: ZmGA20ox
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Gene Symbol: ZmGA20ox Gene Name: gibberellin 20-oxidase Genome: Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: Expression of ZmGA20ox cDNA alters plant morphology and increases biomass production of switchgrass.

item.title: ZmLAC5;ZmLac6
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb148240 Gene Symbol: ZmLAC5 ZmLac6 ZmLAC8 lac5 Gene Name: laccase5 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: ZmmiR528
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: GRMZM5G809042 Gene Symbol: ZmmiR528|miR528a Gene Name: microRNA528 Genome: B73_RefGen_v3 Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: MicroRNA528 Affects Lodging Resistance of Maize by Regulating Lignin Biosynthesis under Nitrogen-Luxury Conditions.

item.title: ZmMYB69
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb405450 Gene Symbol: ZmMYB69 Gene Name: MYB-transcription factor 69 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.
